positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of celestial botanical elements. The main subject is a vibrant, blossoming nebula-infused flower nestled within glowing, geometric vines and crescent moons. The style must be a blend of detailed etching, clean modern vector art, and deep cosmic watercolor washes. Composition should be strictly centered and balanced, utilizing negative space dramatically. Lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, with glowing internal light sources emanating from the flora. Color palette: Deep midnight blue and indigo background contrasting sharply with luminous pops of iridescent gold, silver, and soft lavender. Must have strong, readable outlines suitable for single-color screen printing on apparel.
negative: low detail, blurry, artifacts, grainy, watermark, text, letters, signatures, poorly drawn, asymmetrical, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, cartoonish, grunge, messy lines
